series_metadata.series_description: Data collection document that contains the fall enrollment of each public and non-public school building in Ohio. Enrollment is provided by gender within grade. Ethnic and county of residence counts are also included. Data is used to determine the amount of funds distributed to nonpublic schools for programs such as Auxiliary Services and Administrative Cost Reimbursement pursuant to O.R.C. 3317.06.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: one year collection ; Electronic: one year collection
